_meta.authority: director console 2026-07-21: 'Set the five curriculum values and proceed with the structure.' Authentication convention (a).
_meta.r13_discipline: These are CURRICULUM (difficulty) values the director delegated the agent to set THIS TIME. Set from PUBLISHED-ESTIMATE / neutral priors, NOT tuned to any company outcome (R13 anti-goal-seek core preserved). Versioned + named + ratifiable — a real curriculum artefact, not silent parameter drift. The director may overturn any value; the generator reads this file so a change is one versioned edit, never a code change.
_meta.consumed_by: the segmentation generator (population_draw.assign_cohort + tenure->adoption gating), per docs/design/SEGMENTATION_GENERATOR_BUILD_PLAN.md

green_stance_marginals.basis: DESNZ Public Attitudes Tracker climate-concern distributions, discounted for the well-documented attitude-action gap (concern is high but active pro-environmental engagement is a minority). PROVISIONAL.
green_stance_marginals.note: green_stance has NO company observable (verification §2) — it is generated as hidden SIM truth, never part of a company-discoverable cohort.

price_sensitivity_marginals.basis: GB retail-energy switching/engagement segmentation (Ofgem consumer engagement work): an active-switcher minority, a disengaged 'stuck' minority, a middle majority. PROVISIONAL.

channel_pref_marginals.basis: UK digital-adoption + assisted-digital / vulnerable-customer shares (Ofcom digital inclusion; Ofgem vulnerability). PROVISIONAL.
channel_pref_marginals.note: discoverable via the contact channel actually used.

tenure_adoption_gating_strength.basis: DESNZ Public Attitudes Tracker Spring 2026: 42% of renters say a heat-pump decision 'is not theirs to make' vs 7% of owner-occupiers. The multiplier 0.17 ≈ 7/42 (the owner-vs-renter agency ratio) applied to low-carbon-adoption eligibility for rented tenures. The exact Cramér's V was NOT fabricated (register); this multiplier is the director's gating-STRENGTH dial. PROVISIONAL.
tenure_adoption_gating_strength.note: the SIM-truth gate; the company must DISCOVER that tenure gates adoption from its acquisition/interaction data (the coupled-triad gap).

region_marginal_synthetic_acquisitions.basis: Census 2021 England & Wales household counts by region, normalised over the schema's 10-region set. This is closer to FIDELITY than difficulty (a real population distribution) but is set here so synthetic acquisitions stop defaulting to the UNKNOWN_SYNTHETIC placeholder (population_draw.py:111). PROVISIONAL — shares sum to 1.0.
region_marginal_synthetic_acquisitions.note: region is a public prior the company observes at enrolment.
